title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 17 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 17 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 17 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/02/2022
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends by 3.79%.the main contract closed 684.5. Most traders adopt separate quotations.Market wait-and-see sentiment increased. some traders were negative to sell, Some steel mills tend to buy due to suitable price, Today the overall market transaction atmosphere is acceptable.
